title: Somreth tri-blade
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Somreth tri-blade''' was a type of sword made by the [[Drevun Six]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

[[Mlatar Thon Gra]] used a Somreth tri-blade as one of the three constituent parts of [[Cene Gilvent]]'s customized weapon, the [[Soknar]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
